name: dotnet
description: .NET SDK and runtime command line interface

options.name: --version
options.description: Display the .NET SDK version in use.

options.name: --additionalprobingpath
options.description: Path containing probing policy and assemblies to probe.

options.name: --additional-deps
options.description: Path to an additional deps.json file.

options.name: --depsfile
options.description: Path to the application's deps.json file.

options.name: --fx-version
options.description: Version of the shared framework to use.

options.name: --runtimeconfig
options.description: Path to the application's runtimeconfig.json file.

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build a .NET project, solution, or file-based app.

name: --ucr
--use-current-runtime
options.description: Use the current runtime as the target runtime.

options.name: --version-suffix
options.description: Value for the VersionSuffix MSBuild property.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --nologo
options.description: Do not display startup banner or copyright message.

name: --sc
--self-contained
options.description: Publish the .NET runtime with the application.

subcommands.name: build-server
subcommands.description: Interact with build servers started by .NET.

subcommands.name: shutdown
subcommands.description: Shut down build servers started by .NET.

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Clean build outputs of a .NET project or solution.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

name: -o
--output
options.description: Directory containing build artifacts to clean.

options.name: --nologo
options.description: Do not display startup banner or copyright message.

subcommands.name: https
subcommands.description: Manage ASP.NET Core HTTPS development certificates.

name: -c
--check
options.description: Check whether a valid certificate exists.

name: -ep
--export-path
options.description: Export the certificate to a file.

name: -p
--password
options.description: Password to use when exporting the certificate.

subcommands.name: format
subcommands.description: Apply style preferences to a project or solution.

options.name: --verify-no-changes
options.description: Exit non-zero if files would be formatted.

options.name: --include
options.description: Relative file or folder paths to include.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Relative file or folder paths to exclude.

options.name: --binarylog
options.description: Write project load information to a binary log.

options.name: --report
options.description: Create a JSON report in the given directory.

subcommands.name: style
subcommands.description: Run code style analyzers and apply fixes.

subcommands.name: analyzers
subcommands.description: Run third-party analyzers and apply fixes.

subcommands.name: fsi
subcommands.description: Start F# Interactive or run F# scripts.

options.name: --use
options.description: Use the specified file on startup.

options.name: --load
options.description: Load the specified file on startup.

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Open the reference page for a command.

name: -preprocess
-pp
options.description: Create a single aggregated project file.

subcommands.name: new
subcommands.description: Create a new .NET project or file from a template.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would happen without creating files.

options.name: --force
options.description: Force content generation even when files would be changed.

options.name: --project
options.description: Project to use for context evaluation.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Instantiate a template by short name.

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Check installed template packages for updates and install them.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List templates matching the given name.

subcommands.name: details
subcommands.description: Show details for a template package.

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete or unlist a package from a server.

subcommands.name: locals
subcommands.description: Clear or list local NuGet resources.

subcommands.name: push
subcommands.description: Push a package to a server.

subcommands.name: why
subcommands.description: Show why a package is referenced.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --nologo
options.description: Do not display startup banner or copyright message.

subcommands.name: package
subcommands.description: Search, add, remove, or list PackageReferences for a .NET project.

name: -v
--version
options.description: Version of the package to add.

name: -f
--framework
options.description: Target framework for the package reference.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --exact-match
options.description: Only return exact package ID matches.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --self-contained
options.description: Publish the .NET runtime with the application.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

subcommands.name: reference
subcommands.description: Add, remove, or list ProjectReferences for a .NET project.

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.description: Restore dependencies specified by a .NET project.

options.name: --disable-parallel
options.description: Disable restoring multiple projects in parallel.

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not cache packages and HTTP requests.

options.name: --ignore-failed-sources
options.description: Treat package source failures as warnings.

name: -f
--force
options.description: Force all dependencies to be resolved even if the last restore was successful.

name: -r
--runtime
options.description: Target runtime to restore packages for.

options.name: --force-evaluate
options.description: Force restore to reevaluate all dependencies.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --use-lock-file
options.description: Enable project lock file generation and use.

options.name: --locked-mode
options.description: Do not allow updating the project lock file.

options.name: --lock-file-path
options.description: Output location for the lock file.

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: Build and run a .NET project output.

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the project file to run.

options.name: --file
options.description: Path to the file-based app to run.

options.name: --no-launch-profile
options.description: Do not use launchSettings.json or app.run.json.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

name: --sc
--self-contained
options.description: Publish the .NET runtime with the application.

name: -e
--environment
options.description: Set an environment variable for the application.

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.description: Show the latest available version of installed SDK and runtime feature bands.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add one or more projects to a solution.

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove one or more projects from a solution.

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Migrate a solution file to the latest format.

subcommands.name: store
subcommands.description: Store assemblies in the runtime package store.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: Working directory used by the command.

subcommands.name: test
subcommands.description: Run unit tests using the test runner specified by a .NET project.

name: -s
--settings
options.description: Settings file to use when running tests.

name: -t
--list-tests
options.description: List discovered tests instead of running them.

options.name: --filter
options.description: Run tests matching the given expression.

name: -l
--logger
options.description: Logger to use for test results.

name: -o
--output
options.description: Output directory for binaries to run.

options.name: --results-directory
options.description: Directory where test results are placed.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --blame-crash
options.description: Collect a crash dump when the test host exits unexpectedly.

options.name: --blame-hang
options.description: Collect a hang dump when a test exceeds timeout.

subcommands.name: tool
subcommands.description: Install or manage tools that extend the .NET CLI.

options.name: --framework
options.description: Target framework to install the tool for.

options.name: --ignore-failed-sources
options.description: Treat package source failures as warnings.

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not cache packages and HTTP requests.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --allow-roll-forward
options.description: Allow roll forward to a newer runtime.

options.name: --create-manifest-if-needed
options.description: Create a tool manifest when needed.

options.name: --tool-path
options.description: List tools from the specified path.

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.description: Restore tools from the local tool manifest.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow the command to stop and wait for user input.

options.name: --tool-path
options.description: Update a tool in the specified path.

options.name: --allow-roll-forward
options.description: Allow roll forward to a newer runtime.

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.description: Remove all issued JWTs for a project.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Issue a new JSON Web Token.

subcommands.name: key
subcommands.description: Display or reset the signing key.

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List issued JWTs for the project.

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Set a user secrets ID to enable secret storage.

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set a user secret to the specified value.

name: --Tests
/Tests
options.description: Run tests with the given names.

name: --TestCaseFilter
/TestCaseFilter
options.description: Run tests matching the given expression.

subcommands.name: watch
subcommands.description: Run a command when source files change.

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.description: Restore workloads required by a project.

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Remove workload components left from updates and uninstallations.

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Change or display workload configuration values.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Alias group for adding package or project references.

subcommands.description: Alias group for listing package or project references.

subcommands.description: Alias group for removing package or project references.
